title: Update image-spec and runtime-spec to v1.0.0
body: Update to just-released versions of image-spec and runtime-spec, and the latest version of runtime-tools.  The runtime-spec dropped the `Platform` field, so stop trying to set it when calling out to a runtime as part of handling a `run` command or `RUN` instruction.
